utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format. The final package includes 7 fields. Now check each for full specification per the format: 1) destination: provided and specific (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: specific dates given – fully specified. 3) transportation: format requires flight details with costs; package gives only 'Round-trip flights with a Budget Airline, Economy Class' and 'cost: Included in package' without actual flight details (airline, times) or explicit cost amount, so not fully specified. 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs; name and room details given, but cost is 'Included in package' without a numeric cost breakdown, so not fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs; three activities listed with individual costs totaling 220 – fully specified. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; null means none selected; this is acceptable as an explicit absence, so considered specified. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; they provide package_cost, activities_cost, total_trip_cost with numeric values – fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items are: destination, travel_dates, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 5 out of 7.
